song.title: Ancient Of Days
song.author: Garry Sadler, Jamie Harvill
song.lyrics: [V1] .D Em D Blessing and honor, glory and power . A Bm A Be unto the Ancient of Days .D Em D Em D From ev'ry nation, all of creation .Bm7 A D Bow before the Ancient of Days [C] .G Em7 A Ev'ry tongue in heaven and earth . D/F# Shall declare Your glory .G Em7 A Ev'ry knee shall bow at Your throne . D/F# F#m7 In worship .G Em7 A You will be exalted, O God, .D/F# G Em7 A And Your kingdom shall not pass away . G/A D Dsus O Ancient of Days [V2] . D Your kingdom shall reign over all the earth .C/D G/D Am/D C/D D Sing unto the Ancient of Days . D For none can compare to your matchless worth .C/D G/D Am/D C/D D Sing unto the Ancient of Days
